commands.review_summary:
The PR disables `eslint/no-underscore-dangle` in `.oxlintrc.json`, removes the equivalent `--allow` injection from the Oxlint wrapper, updates wrapper tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main has established `__testing` exports, no matching `.oxlintrc.json` suppression, and a wrapper-only `--allow` override. I did not run Oxlint because this review is read-only.
